calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport, CSR#1694. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Nov-07-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
DONALD MAH, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Philip J. Larocca
JAMES PAUL GREEN, Esq. on behalf of defendant Rosalie Kaochelauii

The parties indicated that this matter has settled after being sent to a Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Fidelity National Title Company Escrow No. 06-9002116-LC to disburse the sum of $354,914.03 to plaintiff Philip Larocca, and disburse the sum of $391,382.56 to defendant Rosalie Kaochelauii and her attorney. As soon as payments have been received, plaintiff will dismiss the case. CC 1542 waiver by all parties. The Court to retain jurisdiction under CCP 664.6. Trial date of 8/21/06 is vacated. All parties to bear own costs and fees.

Judge Pro Tem: Eliott Myles; Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: JoAnn Bryce CSR #3321 (206)
